Frequently Asked Questions

Find answers to common questions about Lansing Area Track Club, our programs, registration, and more.

Registration

What ages can join Lansing Area Track Club?

We serve youth athletes from elementary age through high school. Training groups are organized by age, experience, and development needs.

Practices

What should athletes bring to practice?

Athletes should bring comfortable athletic clothing, running shoes, a water bottle, sunscreen for outdoor practices, and a positive attitude.

General

Does my child need track experience?

No prior experience is required. We welcome athletes of all skill levels and teach proper technique progressively.

Still Have Questions?

Reach out and we will get back to you as soon as possible.

Contact Us

Lansing Area

Track Club

Helping youth athletes in Lansing, Michigan build speed, endurance, confidence, and discipline through track, running, and community since 2015.

Serving Lansing, East Lansing, Okemos, Holt, Waverly, Delta Township and surrounding Mid-Michigan communities.
